title: Android - Switching Accounts
excerpt: New to Monday. Desktop in browser is fantastic. My entire team is on Android however. It appears impossible to access Monday on a mobile device via the browser? So we downloaded the app, but now we cannot switch accounts…

posts.author: Natez (Nate)
posts.cookedHtml:
New to Monday. Desktop in browser is fantastic. My entire team is on Android however. It appears impossible to access Monday on a mobile device via the browser? So we downloaded the app, but now we cannot switch accounts? I see another post in January stating that update would be completed first quarter? We’ve got to be able to switch accounts. If we can’t do it in the app we need to be able to access Monday in the mobile browser to switch accounts.

On Android, either on web or app, how do I switch accounts?
